info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Invoice Management API
info.description: The Invoice Management API enables businesses to efficiently create and manage invoices within their systems. This API allows users to submit new invoices, ensuring accurate billing and documentation processes. Typical consumers include accounting software developers and enterprises managing invoicing needs. The API streamlines financial transactions and enhances overall operational efficiency.

post.description: This endpoint allows you to create a new billing invoice in the system. You need to provide the necessary invoice details in the request body. Upon successful creation, the invoice will be stored and available for further operations.

requestBody.description: Contains the details required to create a new invoice. The body should include necessary attributes such as the invoice amount, due date, and any relevant customer information.

400.description: The request parameters are invalid or missing.

200.description: The request completed successfully and the invoice was processed.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Cr.title: Error Response Schema for Billing Invoices

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the request was successful or not.

error.description: An error code representing the type of error.

errorCode.description: A string representing a specific error code.

message.description: A human-readable message providing more details about the error.
message.example: The order request contains invalid or missing information.

path.description: The path of the request that resulted in the error.

traceId.description: A unique identifier for tracking the request through the system.

validationErrors.description: An array containing validation errors, if any.

example.message: Selected speed is not available for the provided address.

suggestion.description: A suggested action to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Please verify customer details, service availability, and billing information before submitting the order.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Cr.description: A schema that represents the structure of an error response when the billing invoices POST operation returns a 400 status code.

example.message: The order request contains invalid or missing information.

validationErrors.message: Selected speed is not available for the provided address.

example.suggestion: Please verify customer details, service availability, and billing information before submitting the order.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Va.title: Validation Error Details

field.description: The name of the field that caused the validation error.

rejectedValue.description: The value that was provided for the field that was rejected.

message.description: A message describing the reason for the validation failure.
message.example: Invoice amount must be a positive number.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Va.description: A schema that represents a single validation error returned in an error response.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Cr.title: Billing Invoice Request

customerId.description: The unique identifier of the customer.

productId.description: The unique identifier of the product being ordered.

orderType.description: The type of order such as new or upgrade.

serviceDetails.description: Details about the service associated with the invoice.

address.description: The address where the service will be provided.

payment.description: Payment details associated with the invoice.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Cr.description: Request body for creating a billing invoice. It contains details about the customer, product, order type, service details, address, and payment information.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Se.title: Service Details

installationRequired.description: Indicates whether installation is required for the service.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Se.description: Details specific to the service being requested.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Ad.title: Address

street.description: The street address of the location.

city.description: The city where the service is provided.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the address.

country.description: The country where the address is located.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Ad.description: The address corresponding to the customer's service location.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Pa.title: Payment Information

method.description: The method of payment, e.g., credit card or PayPal.

billingAccountId.description: The unique identifier for the billing account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Pa.description: Details related to the payment for the invoice.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Cr.title: Invoice Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the response was created.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful.

message.description: A message providing additional information about the response.

order.description: Details of the order associated with the invoice.

traceId.description: Unique identifier for tracing the operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Cr.description: Response schema for a successful invoice creation operation.

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer who made the order.

orderType.description: Type of the order (e.g., New, Renewal).

status.description: Current status of the order (e.g., Processed, Pending).

createdDate.description: The date and time when the order was created.

estimatedInstallationDate.description: The estimated date when the installation will occur.

service.description: Details of the service associated with the order.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Se.title: Service

serviceType.description: Type of the service (e.g., Internet, Phone).

speed.description: The speed of the service (for Internet services).

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Se.description: Schema representing service details associated with an order.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.

Vary.description: Indicates how the response varies depending on the specific request attributes.

Location.description: The URL of the newly created resource, typically a reference to the created invoice.

content-type.description: The MIME type of the resource being returned in the response.
